systems.name: opencode runtime
systems.description: Bun-based agent runtime; hosts the upload pipeline, message composer, AI session, and the AI-callable upload-time tool.

systems.name: docxmcp service
systems.description: Standalone Python MCP server providing docx operations (extract / patch / rebuild).

systems.name: host filesystem
systems.description: The repo's incoming/ directory; landing zone for uploads and decomposed trees.

containers.name: User-Message Upload Hook
containers.description: tryLandInIncoming + Office hook (DD-9 rewrite). Receives uploaded bytes from chat UI; lands them; for Office mimes runs cache lookup + version-rename + synchronous fast-phase decompose.

containers.name: Polling Loop
containers.description: Per-stem extract_all_collect(wait=0) every 5 s during background; stops on background_status != running OR 180 s safety cap.

containers.name: Message Composer / Routing Hint Generator
containers.description: Reads manifest; renders plain-language routing hint into the user message. Embedded once (DD-13 pull-only — AI re-reads manifest as needed).

containers.name: Attachment Tool
containers.description: AI-callable query tool (image / PDF / text / JSON only after Phase 8 strips Office branches).

containers.name: Telemetry Bus
containers.description: Existing telemetry sink for incoming.decompose events.

containers.name: MCP Tool Dispatcher
containers.description: Existing dispatcher.ts: intercepts AI tool calls passing paths under incoming/, rewrites paths to tokens, ships tar bundles back. Used by Polling Loop to deliver extract_all_collect calls.

containers.name: Extract All Orchestrator (Fast)
containers.description: extract_all entry: synchronously writes outline + template + manifest skeleton; spawns detached background child; returns fast bundle.

containers.name: Extract All Background Child
containers.description: Double-fork-detached grandchild process. Writes body + chapters + tables + media; rewrites manifest to status=done; removes _PENDING.md markers.

containers.name: Extract All Collect
containers.description: Companion entry. Optionally blocks on background_status; bundle producer ships per-token incremental diff via _last_bundled_state.

containers.name: Bundle Producer (Stateful)
containers.description: Per-token _last_bundled_state in mcp_server.py; each MCP call's bundle = files added/modified since last bundle for this token.

containers.name: Per-Tool Extractors
containers.description: Existing extract_text / extract_outline / extract_chapter / extract_styles scripts; reused from new orchestrator.

components.name: Office Mime Detector
components.description: Classifies upload by mime + extension into docx | doc | xls | ppt | xlsx | pptx | non-office.

components.name: Cache Lookup
components.description: Reads incoming/<stem>/manifest.json to determine hit / fresh / regen verdict.

components.name: Decompose Router
components.description: Dispatches to docxmcp / legacy scanner / unsupported writer based on format.

components.name: Legacy OLE2 Scanner
components.description: In-process two-pass printable-runs scanner; emits body.md preserving layout.

components.name: Failure Recorder
components.description: Writes failure.md + failure manifest; never silent.

components.name: Stem Dir Manager
components.description: Renames prior dirs to incoming/<stem>-<old-timestamp>/ on sha drift; writes new tree.

components.name: Routing Hint Renderer
components.description: Reads manifest, applies >4 fold rule, produces plain-language hint.

components.name: Body Outline Chapter Extractor
components.description: Sub-step of extract_all: runs existing extract_text / extract_outline / extract_chapter.

components.name: Template Asset Extractor
components.description: Sub-step of extract_all: copies styles / theme / numbering XML out of unpack tree; repackages template.dotx.

components.name: Manifest Emitter
components.description: Sub-step of extract_all: writes manifest.json reflecting everything produced.

relationships.label: Python function call (in-process for outline + template)
Python function call (background: body + chapters + tables + media)
write incoming/<stem>/* fast artifacts + manifest skeleton + _PENDING markers
write incoming/<stem>/* incremental artifacts as polls return
incoming.decompose event (one per upload, includes background outcome eventually)
(only for image / PDF / text / JSON refs after Phase 8)
